2605.08037.title: Beyond Pairs: Your Language Model is Secretly Optimizing a Preference Graph
2605.08037.paper_summary: Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) aligns language models using pairwise preference comparisons, offering a simple and effective alternative to Reinforcement Learning (RL) from human feedback. However, in many practical settings, training data consists of multiple rollouts per prompt, inducing rich preference structure that pairwise DPO fails to exploit. Collapsing such data into independent pairs discards transitivity, introduces redundant or conflicting supervision, and can lead to unstable optimization. We propose Graph Direct Preference Optimization (GraphDPO), a principled generalization of DPO that operates over directed acyclic preference graphs induced by rollout rankings. GraphDPO encodes dominance relations as edges and optimizes a graph-structured Plackett--Luce-inspired objective that aggregates supervision over graph neighborhoods, enforcing transitivity while recovering standard DPO as a special case. To handle discrete or sparse signals, we introduce an equivalence-class construction where responses with identical preferences form graph layers, and intra-layer edges contribute zero loss, preventing spurious gradients. Despite leveraging full graph structure, GraphDPO maintains linear per-prompt complexity via efficient log-sum-exp aggregation. We further incorporate optional ground-truth anchoring by inserting verified solutions as dominant nodes and applying an annealed schedule that stabilizes early training while gradually relaxing oracle supervision. Experiments on reasoning and program synthesis tasks demonstrate superior performance, suggesting that graph-structured preference modeling is a scalable and robust alternative to pairwise and listwise alignment objectives.
2605.08037.paper_summary_zh: 直接偏好優化（DPO）通過成對偏好比較來調整語言模型，提供了一種簡單且有效的替代方案，取代來自人類反饋的強化學習（RL）。然而，在許多實際情境中，訓練數據由每個提示的多次回合組成，產生豐富的偏好結構，而成對的DPO未能充分利用這一點。將這些數據壓縮為獨立的對會丟棄傳遞性，引入冗餘或衝突的監督，並可能導致不穩定的優化。我們提出了圖形直接偏好優化（GraphDPO），這是一種基於回合排名所誘導的有向無環偏好圖的DPO原則性推廣。GraphDPO將優勢關係編碼為邊，並優化一個受Plackett--Luce啟發的圖結構目標，該目標聚合了圖鄰域中的監督，強化了傳遞性，同時將標準DPO恢復為特例。為了處理離散或稀疏信號，我們引入了一種等價類構造，其中具有相同偏好的回應形成圖層，而層內邊緣貢獻零損失，防止虛假梯度。儘管利用了完整的圖結構，GraphDPO通過高效的對數和指數聚合保持每個提示的線性複雜度。我們進一步通過將經過驗證的解作為優勢節點插入，並應用退火計劃來穩定早期訓練，同時逐漸放鬆oracle監督，來納入可選的真實錨定。對推理和程序合成任務的實驗顯示出優越的性能，表明圖結構的偏好建模是成對和列表對齊目標的可擴展且穩健的替代方案。
2605.08037.author: Ning Liu et.al.
2605.08037.authors: Ning Liu, Chuanneng Sun, Kristina Klinkner, Shervin Malmasi
